notes: Each GLB is self-contained: skinned mesh + skeleton + 2 animation clips. Play BOTH clips together on one AnimationMixer for the full effect (character motion + broccoli shrinking as it is eaten). The broccoli prop is parented to the left hand and disappears around frame 55. Files live in per-character subfolders under /assets/characters.

characters.skeletonNote: Mixamo-derived but bones renamed without the 'mixamorig:' prefix; 31 bones, no finger bones. NOT directly clip-compatible with the rabbit rig.
Standard Mixamo rig ('mixamorig:' prefix); 41 bones including fingers. Recommended target rig for new characters.

other.note: Pre-existing export at the public root (apps/web/public/assets/characters/). The squirrel character; kept at root to avoid breaking its existing import path.
